이사야 54:1.content: “Sing, barren, you who didn’t give birth; break out into singing, and cry aloud, you who didn’t travail with child: for more are the children of the desolate than the children of the married wife,” says Yahweh.

이사야 54:2.content: “Enlarge the place of your tent, and let them stretch out the curtains of your habitations; don’t spare: lengthen your cords, and strengthen your stakes.

이사야 54:3.content: For you will spread out on the right hand and on the left; and your offspring will possess the nations and settle in desolate cities.

이사야 54:4.content: “Don’t be afraid, for you will not be ashamed. Don’t be confounded, for you will not be disappointed. For you will forget the shame of your youth. You will remember the reproach of your widowhood no more.

이사야 54:5.content: For your Maker is your husband; Yahweh of Armies is his name. The Holy One of Israel is your Redeemer. He will be called the God of the whole earth.

이사야 54:6.content: For Yahweh has called you as a wife forsaken and grieved in spirit, even a wife of youth, when she is cast off,” says your God.

이사야 54:7.content: “For a small moment I have forsaken you, but I will gather you with great mercies.

이사야 54:8.content: In overflowing wrath I hid my face from you for a moment, but with everlasting loving kindness I will have mercy on you,” says Yahweh your Redeemer.

이사야 54:9.content: “For this is like the waters of Noah to me; for as I have sworn that the waters of Noah will no more go over the earth, so I have sworn that I will not be angry with you, nor rebuke you.

이사야 54:10.content: For the mountains may depart, and the hills be removed; but my loving kindness will not depart from you, and my covenant of peace will not be removed,” says Yahweh who has mercy on you.

이사야 54:11.content: “You afflicted, tossed with storms, and not comforted, behold, I will set your stones in beautiful colors, and lay your foundations with sapphires.

이사야 54:12.content: I will make your pinnacles of rubies, your gates of sparkling jewels, and all your walls of precious stones.

이사야 54:13.content: All your children will be taught by Yahweh; and your children’s peace will be great.

이사야 54:14.content: You will be established in righteousness. You will be far from oppression, for you will not be afraid, and far from terror, for it shall not come near you.

이사야 54:15.content: Behold, they may gather together, but not by me. Whoever gathers together against you will fall because of you.

이사야 54:16.content: “Behold, I have created the blacksmith who fans the coals into flame, and forges a weapon for his work; and I have created the destroyer to destroy.

이사야 54:17.content: No weapon that is formed against you will prevail; and you will condemn every tongue that rises against you in judgment. This is the heritage of Yahweh’s servants, and their righteousness is of me,” says Yahweh.
